title: Gentleman Joe Palooka
writer: Ham Fisher, Cy Endfield, Hal E. Chester
actors: Leon Errol, Joe Kirkwood Jr., Guy Kibbee
plot: In the second film of Monogram's "Joe Palooka" series, Joe is 'used', by two state senators scheming to obtain oil-rich lands, in a publicity campaign to get the land transferred to the state, supposedly for a park. When Joe learn...
